name: New Claim - Channel Change After Send
description: Caller confirms SMS then asks for email after it was sent.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: Text me the link at 555-0142. ... Actually, can you email it instead?
expectedOutcome: Agent sends SMS, then handles the change: confirms what was already sent, collects/confirms email, sends email version, and clearly states what went where without silent duplicates.
